fix_plan: Change the outer container div in RoomIntroOverlay.tsx from 'fixed inset-0' to 'absolute inset-0' so the overlay is positioned relative to the canvas container (which is position:relative) instead of the browser viewport. This is the minimum one-word CSS class change that constrains the overlay to the 640x480 game canvas area.
diff_summary: Changed 'fixed' to 'absolute' in the outer container div className
notes: Root cause confirmed: 'fixed' positions relative to viewport, 'absolute' positions relative to nearest positioned ancestor (canvas container).
